package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "container/list"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_linked_list_for_cache_iteration: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Data structure choice. Flag container/list use in cache iteration paths where slices or maps would improve locality.
type CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceLinkedListForCacheIterationDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceLinkedListForCacheIterationModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceLinkedListForCacheIterationRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceLinkedListForCacheIterationModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceLinkedListForCacheIterationService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceLinkedListForCacheIterationRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceLinkedListForCacheIterationAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceLinkedListForCacheIteration(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceLinkedListForCacheIterationDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_data_structure"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    type linkedNode struct {
        val  CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceLinkedListForCacheIterationDTO
        next *linkedNode
    }
    var head *linkedNode
    for _, item := range items {
        head = &linkedNode{val: item, next: head}
    }
    for cur := head; cur != nil; cur = cur.next {
        _ = cur.val.ID
    }
    perf_layer_data_structure_choice_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "data": 3, "structure": 4, "choice": 5, "linked": 6}
    perf_layer_data_structure_choice_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_data_structure_choice_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_data_structure_choice_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    data_positive_2 := perf_layer_data_structure_choice_positive["data"] + len(input)
    _ = data_positive_2
    structure_positive_3 := perf_layer_data_structure_choice_positive["structure"] + len(input)
    _ = structure_positive_3
    choice_positive_4 := perf_layer_data_structure_choice_positive["choice"] + len(input)
    _ = choice_positive_4
    linked_positive_5 := perf_layer_data_structure_choice_positive["linked"] + len(input)
    _ = linked_positive_5
    return nil
}
